creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Misfiled followup to ports/110188. 

Unfortuately, without the Subject: line set to 'Re: ports/110188: ' at 
the beginning, GNATS cannot properly file the PR. 

Normally, I would move the bits over, but since they were encoded with 
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable", they are not usable, so 
I'm just closing this.
